parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While this is On, the Cache will capture images into its memory.

parameters.name: activepulse
parameters.label: Active Pulse
parameters.description: Captures an image for the single frame this was pulsed.

parameters.name: cacheonce
parameters.label: Get One Image on Startup
parameters.description: Checking this On will cook the once after startup to load an initial image.

parameters.name: replace
parameters.label: Replace Single
parameters.description: While this is On, the Cache will replace the image at 'Replace Index' with the input image. This allows you to replace specific images in the cache at will.

parameters.name: replacespulse
parameters.label: Replace Pulse
parameters.description: Replace an image for the single frame this was pulsed.

parameters.name: replaceindex
parameters.label: Replace Index
parameters.description: Select the image index that will be replaced by the input, when 'Replace Single' is turned on.

parameters.name: prefill
parameters.label: Pre-Fill
parameters.description: Cooks 'Cache Size' number of times to fill the Cache with images. When set to 1, it will fill the cache. If set to 1 during playback, it will fill immediately. If set to 1 and saved out, then next tim

parameters.name: prefillpulse
parameters.label: Pre-Fill Pulse
parameters.description: Pre-fills a single image during the frame this was pulsed.

parameters.name: cachesize
parameters.label: Cache Size
parameters.description: Determines the number of images that can be stored in this Cache .

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: The number of cooks that go by before the Cache grabs an image. A Step Size of 2 will cache an image every 2nd cook, a Step Size of 3 will cache every 3rd cook, and so on.

parameters.name: outputindex
parameters.label: Output Index
parameters.description: Determines which image in cache the outputs. 0 is the most recent image, negative integers output image further back in time.

parameters.name: outputindexunit
parameters.label: Output Index Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Output Index parameter.

parameters.name: interp
parameters.label: Interpolate Frames
parameters.description: When On (On = 1), the Cache will interpolate between frames when non-integer values are used in the Output Index parameter. For example, a value of -0.5 in Output Index will output a blended image of

parameters.name: alwayscook
parameters.label: Always Cook
parameters.description: Forces the operator to cook every frame.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: While On this will empty the cache of stored images and release the memory held by the .
